label: Ready for demo
description: Run report is present, no kill switch is active, and the operator can present current proof artifacts.

label: Generate run state
description: The run report is missing or unreadable. Start paper mode and regenerate the current report before demo.

label: Kill switch active
description: Trading must remain stopped until the kill-switch event is reviewed and the operator explicitly restarts the agent.

label: Capture transaction proof
description: The event log does not show a confirmed transaction. Run paper competition mode or inspect the TWAK execution path.

label: Review current book
description: The report is available, but the operator should review alerts, exposure, and the next rebalance before continuing.
